message:
Fix e2e test assertions for better reliability

- Add wait for input focus before pressing Escape in "closes with Escape key"
  test (Escape handler is on the focused input, not the dialog)
- Use "wizard" search term in arrow navigation test (other terms like
  "prompt", "the", "a" return no results due to search engine filtering)
- Add proper assertions to "can navigate to prompt detail page" test
  (verify dialog opens instead of just waiting)
- Add assertion to "can filter by category" test (verify heading changes)
- Add assertion to "clicking result item selects it" test (verify copied
  feedback appears)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
